details.test: Task 1: Save earliest April home game for Tigers to My Schedule
Task 2: Register for cheapest 9-10U spring break clinic starting at or after 9:00 AM
Task 3: Sign up as scorekeeper for weekday and Saturday games at Field 2
Task 4: Save nearest lighted field with restrooms to My Fields
Task 5: Bookmark Spring 2025 10U Minors bat regulations
Task 6: Send mid-season joining question to team coach
Task 7: Add 3rd-place 10U Minors team with at least 5 wins to Favorite Teams
Task 8: Share latest Field 3 weather cancellation to Tigers team page
Task 9: Add three youth logo items to cart under $75 and normalize quantities
